t: [... the waters] which come down stood piled up
[...the sons of Israel cr]ossed over when it was dry, in the
[fi]rst month of the forty-fi[rst] year of their departure from the la[nd of]
Egypt; it was the year of the Jubilees at the start of their entry into the land of
Canaan; and the Jordan was full with wat[er] towards all its banks and it flooded
[with] its water from the month ... [...] until the month of the wheat harvest
